CREATE TABLE time_test (starttime TIME, endtime TIME);
SELECT datediff('hour', starttime, endtime) FROM time_test;
SELECT t1.starttime, t1.endtime, datediff('hour', t1.starttime, t1.endtime) AS diff_hours FROM time_test t1 WHERE t1.starttime < TIME '12:00:00';
SELECT AVG(datediff('minute', starttime, endtime)) FROM time_test GROUP BY starttime;
CREATE TABLE time_ranges AS SELECT DISTINCT datediff('hour', TIME '00:00:00', endtime) AS hours_diff FROM time_test;
